creator: mia-rain@tuta.io
text:
Created attachment 236274
patch to update ubuntu-keyring

security/ubuntu-keyring: update to 2021.03.26

Patch updates ubuntu-keyring to use the version provided by ubuntu as debian's is out of date and the newest version is required for future updates. 

The patch also changes MAINTAINER to mia-rain[@]tuta.io (me) as the package is orphaned.
